ZModules.ZDescription: Dashboard runtime and analytics.
Status console and log router.
Energy and harmony pulse engine.
Emotional coherence and response mode.
Chronicle capture and timeline memory.
Chronicle HUD display layer.
Super Saiyan Autopilot control plane.
Security, Etiquette, Protocol & Compassion gate.
Wisdom and lawful stability.
Compassion and gentle resolution.
Multi-agent reasoning and oversight tower.
Logs, summaries, and reflections.
Security and runtime monitoring.
UI and style advisor.
Next-step and safety guidance.
Legacy Roulette Calculator workspace imported and linked to Z-Modules Registry.
Social Arena profiles, chat, and streams.
Acoustic Cognition Gene: passive+active posture from reports; Living Pulse panel; task Z: Soundscape Posture.
Local-first voice+text orchestrator across registered projects with citations, policy gate, approval actions, and evidence spine.
Hub methodology: structured Q, citation-backed A, explicit pathways for follow-up vs bounded autonomy; registry-first and verifier-linked to limit cross-project mix-ups.
JSON blueprint + bootstrap/verify scripts and operator doc so Cursor AI and humans keep the same directory spine across Cursor versions and multi-root workspaces.
Workspace package: loadPcRootProjects from real z_pc_root_projects.json; runVerifyCI delegates to npm run verify:ci — no duplicate registry.
Read-only pre-alert brief from hub reports + registry paths. npm run papao:precaution-emit → data/reports/z_papao_precaution_brief.{json,md}. Dashboard: z-ai-ecosphere.

Read-only ingest of hub reports; emits advisory curriculum JSON + Markdown (npm run krtaa:curriculum-emit). Dashboard: dashboard/z-ai-ecosphere. Prompt packs v3: docs/z-krtaa-prompt-packs/. HODP links in Control Centre + Blueprint.
Advisory: stale comms observers, AAFRTC, learning inactivity, signal cold, comms flow, planned backlog. Pairs with RTRO. scripts/z_fhmff_lite.mjs; npm run ai:fhmff:lite. No auto-fix.
Bounded verifier chain (registry, structure, formulas, AI consistency, vault spine) → one JSON/MD receipt. Advisory only: no enforcer or release control. npm run z:codex:zecce:verify.
HTML report from zuno JSON (Chart.js + Mermaid + ZECCE). PPTX: npm run report:ecosphere:pptx. PDF: browser print. See docs/public/z_ecosphere_transparency_report/README.md.

data/z_whale_bus_spine.json: decks comms_sync + surface_reinforce. npm: z:whale-bus:comms+surfaces, z:whale-bus:surfaces. PS: Start-ZWhaleBusComms -CommsAndSurfaces. Ties to z_ai_ecosphere_config rings. docs/Z-WHALE-BUS-SPINE.md

Phase A+B codex: index + SHA-256 for core manifests + workspace lint snapshot (declared .code-workspace vs registry). Vault pointers only. npm run kbozsu:refresh · kbozsu:refresh:with-lint → data/reports/z_kbozsu_codex.json + .md
Observe-only: bot:guardian (PC paths vs registry), bot:sync (registry snapshot to bot_sync_snapshots/, not full tree), bot:health (Node/OS). bots/README.md
Advisory fusion vector from guardian/alerts/decisions/patterns/rootcause/predict/adaptive/execution. Emits z_qosmei_core_signal.{json,md} for dashboard rail, AI status, Whale Bus, and Zuno.
Cross-layer advisory (v2): predictive_signals, evolution_phase, decision_suggestions, pre_warnings file for Guardian. Emits z_structural_patterns.{json,md} + z_spi_guardian_pre_warnings.json.
Advisory merge of SPI decision_suggestions with pending governance rows → z_spi_decision_advice.{json,md}. Dashboard panel dashboard/panels/z_decision_panel.html.

z_learning_evaluator (Guardian+resolve → z_learning_history.jsonl, z_learning_evaluation.json) + z_adaptive_weight_tuner → z_adaptive_learning_state.json. Injected into SPI score + QOSMEI. AL rail badge. Reversible: delete z_adaptive_learning_state.json

Read-only synthesizer: SPI + adaptive state + QOSMEI → z_cross_system_learning.{json,md}. No execution, no tuner feed. QOSMEI reads prior run for small confidence/risk nudge. CS rail badge. npm run cross:system after qosmei:signal.

Experience-weighted heuristics from SPI, learning, cross-system, patterns, decisions, QOSMEI → z_predictive_intelligence.{json,md}. Advisory-only; fusion_hint nudges QOSMEI when second qosmei:signal runs (Whale Bus). PR rail badge. npm run predictive:intel after cross:system.

Heuristic check of predictive output vs decision/learning/pattern logs. Append-only data/logs/z_prediction_validation_history.jsonl. Feeds QOSMEI and next-run predictive confidence scaling. PV rail badge. npm run prediction:validate after predictive:intel.

Data-driven HTML staging for new flows and modules before fusion to main SKK and RKPK. State file lists items and fusion policy. Secondary to index-skk-rkpk; linked from Control Centre Build and automate.

TypeScript advisory engine: v11–v19; v15 Guardian, v18 Ethics. Z-ECR: EnergyMode + ZECRBranch in runGGAESP; HIGH+GO downgraded to PREPARE; branch in memoryCapsule. Phase 2: memory JSONL + ggaesp_memory; npm run ggaesp:memory:append. Panel: ggaesp_panel (Z-Add On). Not release authority.

Emotional storytelling and self-reflection engine (LA-LT, HB1-HB7) with compassion/consent boundaries. PREPARE ONLY: docs, narrative templates, fictional mocks; no people scoring, no relationship prediction, no control logic.

Unified client-side visual modes for HODP and static guides: CSS token sets per body[data-display-mode], top-rail Morph selector, localStorage (zSanctuaryDisplayMorphMode), postMessage sync to Twin Roots iframe, standalone Cloudflare deployment guide page. Observational/no backend authority.

Z-Project Passport: data/z_project_passports/*.json; share_level enum; internal_notes rules. Validator: npm run z:project-passports:verify → data/reports/z_project_passport_validator.json. No secrets, no deploy. Future: Commander, Twin Roots, ledger refs.

Cross-module compassion layer: verified partners, quiet hours, no fake AI animal emotions, optional Z-PI&S z_anima_profile. Lite mock UI: dashboard/panels/z_anima_core_lite.html + data/z_anima_lite_mock.json (read-only). Phased real Lite later. Ethics in doc; no deploy or payment in mock.
